message:
chore(tests,model): update JSON contract for new session metrics and apply rustfmt

Update json_contract_test.rs to include the seven new fields added
to the list --json output schema: avg_agent_response_chars,
avg_agent_response_chars_rounded, file_size_bytes, file_size_kb,
last_active_at, tool_uses, and unique_user_messages. Without this
update, the assert_exact_keys check would fail on any list output
that includes these new metric fields.

Also apply rustfmt-style formatting to model.rs (multi-line closures
in parse_timestamp for float-to-millis conversion) and
cass_parity_test.rs (long assert_eq lines broken across multiple
lines for readability). No logic changes in these formatting updates.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
